rulings.Case Title: JOSEY RUSSELL VS. BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 23, 2015, line 4. DEFENDANTS RECONTRUST COMPANY, BANK OF AMERICA, AND HSBC BANK USA, A Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings The Court DENIES as to the First, Second, Third, and Fifth Causes of Action. Plaintiff alleged sufficient facts to support those causes of action. The Court GRANTS WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND as to the Fourth Cause of Action. = (501/req)

rulings.Case Title: SHANEEDA JAFFER VS. DESIREE ELIOTT CHACHETTE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To: (1) Compel Defendant'S Rersponsers, Without Objection, To Plaintiff'S Form Interrogatories; General, Set One, For Interrogatories-Unlawful Detainer, Set One, Special Interrogatories, Set One, And Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, (2) Deem Admissions, And (3) Request For Monetary And Terminating Sanctions Against Defendant
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 23, 2015, line 10. PLAINTIFF SHANEEDA JAFFER Notice Of Motion And Motion To: (1) Compel Defendant'S Rersponsers, Without Objection, To Plaintiff'S Form Interrogatories; General, Set One, For Interrogatories-Unlawful Detainer, Set One, Special Interrogatories, Set One, And Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, (2) Deem Admissions, And (3) Request For Monetary And Terminating Sanctions Against Defendant GRANTED, subject to Opposition. Defendant has failed to timely respond to P's discovery requests, and has waived all objections. (CCP § 2030.250.) The truth of any matter specified in the request for admissions [set 1] is deemed admitted because Defendant failed to timely tender discovery responses. (CCP § 2033.280.) The Court GRANTS $1,000 as monetary sanctions, and DENIES terminating sanctions. = (501/REQ)
